etymology.sol: Solid / Solution (Physical world, solid-state physics, metallurgical alloys)
etymology.bion: Bionic / Biological (Software orchestration, active learning, autonomous adaptation)

positioning.statement: The autonomous engine for materials discovery. A data factory for the physical world.
positioning.core_philosophy: Moving away from sequential, human-driven trial-and-error toward closed-loop Bayesian optimization and active learning.
positioning.value_proposition: 10x speed-to-data, drastic cost reduction per formulation, and complete mapping of the physical multi-dimensional chemical space.

primary_background.name: Carbon Black
primary_background.usage: Main background, laboratory aesthetic, vacuum environments

accent.name: Laser Cyan
accent.usage: Data streams, active learning paths, plasma plumes, call-to-action elements

baseline.name: Steel Grey
baseline.usage: Lattice grid lines, secondary text, negative/failed data points

logo_concept.name: The Lattice Matrix
logo_concept.geometry: Hexagonal grid system (representing close-packing in crystalline structures)

elements.background_dots: Steel Grey points representing the uncharted theoretical space
elements.active_path: Laser Cyan connected line representing autonomous AI navigation
elements.nodes: Glow-effect Cyan circles marking discovered, highly optimized knowledge points

allowed: Macro-photography of hardware (PVD plasma plumes, ultra-high vacuum flanges, silicon wafers)
High-fidelity data visualizations (3D topological maps of resistivity/conductivity curves)
forbidden: Generic stock photos of scientists in lab coats looking at colored liquids in beakers

editorial_guidelines.tone_of_voice: Hyper-pragmatic, confident, technically authoritative, and direct
taglines: Mapping the physical world at the speed of software.
High-throughput materials discovery. Zero human bottlenecks.
Don't spend two years searching a chemical space. Let Solbion map it in two weeks.
